meaning: adj.轻率的,匆忙的,卤莽的n.[医]皮疹
examples: Her face broke out in a rash.
Has your rash cleared up yet?
Three days later a rash appeared.
It causes a distinctive rash on the body - and can lead to meningitis and pneumonia.
Provoked by the rash of corporate scandals, shareholders in company after company rebelled against management this past spring.
